description: Cross-platform, token-driven design system: React (@ghds/react), framework-agnostic Web Components/Lit (@ghds/web-components), and React Native (@ghds/react-native) components sharing @ghds/tokens design values.
rules: Consume sys.*/comp.* design tokens; never hardcode colors/spacing/typography and never reference ref.* tokens directly.
@ghds/react, @ghds/web-components and @ghds/react-native have NO root export — import each component from its kebab-case subpath, e.g. import { Button } from '@ghds/react/button'.
Import '@ghds/tokens/css' once at the app entry for React/Web Components. React Native reads tokens from the JS object: import { tokens } from '@ghds/tokens'.
Rebrand/theme by overriding --sys-* CSS custom properties (they cascade to every component); never hardcode brand colors or fork components. Always cover dark mode via [data-theme="dark"].

Prop and event names diverge across platforms — never port a prop from one platform to another. React Native change events are onChangeText/onCheckedChange (not onChange); Web Components emit gh-* custom events.
React Native drops some variants and props (e.g. Button has no neutral variant and takes label: string, no children). Check rules/platform-differences.md before assuming parity.
FormField wraps exactly one control and wires its label, helper text, error, and aria.
Feedback: Alert = inline persistent, Toast = auto-dismiss, Modal = blocking decision; Skeleton = first-paint placeholder, Spinner = inline loading.
